name: smartbooks-accounting-app
description: SmartBooks Accounting App split into frontend, backend, shared, and docs folders.

scripts.check: node --check backend/src/server.js && node --check frontend/src/main.js && node --check frontend/src/features/sales-tax-inventory-ui.js && node --check frontend/src/features/workflows-and-reporting.js && node --check frontend/src/features/dashboard-widgets.js && node --check frontend/src/features/navigation-search.js && node --check frontend/src/features/record-workflows.js && node --check frontend/src/runtime/stability-and-api.js
